caption:
Did you know these?👇🏼

☀️Florida Fun Facts to celebrate Earth Day!🌎 

🐊Alligator Central – Florida has over 1.3 million alligators, so you’re never too far from a toothy neighbor.

🐠Home to the Only Coral Reef in the U.S. – The Florida Reef stretches over 360 miles, making it a tropical treasure for marine life.

💦Florida Has Over 700 Natural Springs – It’s home to the largest concentration of freshwater springs in the world.

🌊Over 1,300 Miles of Coastline – Florida has more coastline than any state except Alaska, with endless beaches to explore.

🐮Manatee Haven – Florida’s warm waters are a sanctuary for manatees, especially in winter when they flock to springs.

🌴Over 300 State Parks & Preserves – Florida protects more than 10 million acres of wild lands for hiking, paddling, and wildlife spotting.

Happy Earth Day! 🌱 

Share with some who loves Mother Earth!🌏
